_comment: Components that legitimately have NO figmaComponentId (F2 fix). These are built natively — layout wrappers (auto-layout frames), child sub-items of a parent composite, or runtime-only constructs with no standalone kit component. build-registry-bundle.js fails (exit 2) if a component NOT on this list has an empty figmaComponentId, so a real missing key can never slip through silently.
_notKeyless: _schema is a JSON-schema file, not a component — the build script skips it.
